role: Root directory of the ArchSpine project mirror system, containing core configuration and architectural rules.
responsibility: Combines the project’s operational configuration (scanning, artifact generation, hooks) with architectural constraint definitions to enable consistent mirror system behavior and maintain codebase integrity.

children.role: Root configuration for the ArchSpine project mirror system, defining core operational parameters, scanning policy, artifact generation, hooks, and initialization defaults.
Defines architectural constraints and naming conventions for the ArchSpine codebase.
